overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a covered urban underpass transitioning from a makeshift homeless camp to a neon-lit commercial walkway, ending at a food vendor stall. The environment features wet ground, tents, burning barrels, and vibrant neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift homeless camp under concrete overpass

events.description: ground surface transitions from muddy dirt to paved concrete

agents.ego_description: walking through muddy camp area under the overpass, navigating between tents and debris

notable_agents.action: standing near burning barrel warming hands
sitting on cardboard boxes next to tents

entered.detail: metal barrel with active fire providing warmth and light
makeshift camping tents set up on the muddy ground
large structural support pillars for the overpass above
metal chain-link fence with wooden slats behind

segments.scene_description: Walking through a makeshift homeless camp under a concrete overpass at night. The ground is muddy and wet, with tents set up on either side. A burning barrel provides warmth in the center while people stand or sit nearby. The area is dimly lit with a mix of firelight and ambient city glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with construction barricades

events.description: exiting muddy camp area into paved commercial underpass with barricades
ambient firelight replaced by colorful neon signage from nearby shops

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved walkway passing red and white construction barricades

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with backpack walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: construction barriers with red and white checkered pattern
illuminated commercial signs glowing in pink and blue
shop entrances with glass windows and illuminated interiors

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the muddy camp to a paved commercial walkway under the overpass. Red and white construction barricades line the right side while neon signs from distant shops begin to illuminate the scene. The concrete ground is dry here, and more pedestrians are visible walking ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial arcade with neon advertisements and shops

events.description: passing by the prominent Wild Blue establishment with bright neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy commercial corridor observing shop fronts and advertisements

notable_agents.action: woman in teal dress walking toward camera
pedestrian with red hair and white shirt walking past

entered.detail: large illuminated sign for Wild Blue establishment in teal neon
large electronic advertising screens displaying colorful graphics
commercial storefronts with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: Walking through a vibrant covered commercial arcade lined with neon signs and digital billboards. The 'Wild Blue' club sign glows prominently on the left while various pedestrians walk in different directions. The environment is fully covered with a high concrete ceiling and structural beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor stall with illuminated display

events.description: slowing down and approaching the food vendor stall
interacting with vendor at the food stall and examining the food display

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping at the food vendor stall to look at the menu and food display

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind counter waiting to serve customers

entered.detail: food service counter with glass display case and illuminated menu
glass case containing displayed food items including burgers and noodles
illuminated menu sign with decorative tree graphic

segments.scene_description: Approaching a food vendor stall at the end of the commercial walkway. The stall features an illuminated display case with food items and a vendor waiting behind the counter. The surrounding area has various shop stalls and neon lighting continues to illuminate the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a concrete underpass that transforms from a bleak homeless encampment into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial arcade. It begins by wading through a muddy, dimly lit camp where tents line the path and a burning barrel casts a flickering glow over the residents. As the camera moves forward, the muddy terrain shifts to dry pavement marked by red and white construction barricades, while the distant flicker of city lights begins to brighten the surroundings. The scene then expands into a covered walkway dominated by high concrete beams and glowing digital billboards, most notably the prominent neon sign for the Wild Blue club. Finally, the path leads directly toward a brightly illuminated food vendor stall, where an illuminated display case and a waiting vendor mark the end of the transit.
